Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Brother Aekin]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Brother Aekin is from Abyssal Palace and wears hooded sacred artist’s robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Maraan oversaw the early training of Brother Aekin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Brother Aekin could not handle the opponents Lindon faced.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Brother Aekin is Ziel's rematch opponent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Brother Aekin's Path is modeled after the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Brother Aekin's Path emphasizes endurance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Brother Aekin was the target of Ziel's brief rampage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Brother Aekin is a person Lindon thought he could beat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Sophara would fight Brother Aekin in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Brother Aekin was obliterated by Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Aekin was wearing a stone mask with one eye glowing yellow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Brother Aekin competed against Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Brother Aekin used his Enforcer technique to take on the aspect of the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Brother Aekin is an Uncrowned of Abyssal Palace.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
